description: Research current US crop market conditions for corn, soybeans, and wheat using official USDA data sources (e.g., ERS, NASS, WASDE). Save at least one official USDA report or data file to the Downloads folder and produce a planting allocation brief at /home/ga/Desktop/planting_brief.txt that includes recent price data for all three commodities, source citations, and a planting recommendation based on the data.

metadata.occupation_context: Farm Operations Manager - market research for planting decisions
